name: My employer is cutting my hours after I filed occupational illness claim, is that retaliation?
description: Yes, illegal; document and complain to labor board.

mainEntity.name: My employer is cutting my hours after I filed occupational illness claim, is that retaliation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, illegal; document and complain to labor board.
acceptedAnswer.description:
Possibly illegal; protected activity.

Utah/Idaho ban retaliation for comp claims; prove timing link.

- Document changes, communications.
- File complaint with labor dept.
- Seek reinstatement, backpay.

Attorney protects rights quickly.
